subject: Live in 1 Hour: Observability for AI Systems
body_html:
One attendee will win a Dynatrace Developer Experience Swag Pack. ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­  

Hi A,

 

We're about to start! Join us live in 1 hour for a deep dive on integrating observability into everyday workflows. Explore real-world examples and live debugging demonstrations that show how to move faster, escalate less, and build more reliable AI-driven systems from the start.

Join Us Live

Webinar Takeaways:

  • Shift-Left Observability: Catch and understand issues during development, not just in production.
  • Faster Debugging: Use runtime telemetry to investigate incidents without redeploying code.
  • Modern Signal Management: Make sense of logs and traces across complex, distributed systems.
  • Developer Ownership: Build a culture of monitoring-as-code and better instrumentation.

Live Giveaway: One attendee will win a Dynatrace Developer Experience Swag Pack, including a t-shirt, Visa Cash App Racing Bulls apparel, and the Progressive Delivery book. If you can’t join live, register anyway and we’ll send you the recording!

More webinars coming up

The next step for continuous delivery: An IDP-driven platform

Continuous Delivery solved deployment, but as AI accelerates software delivery, pipelines are still hard for developers to access without tribal knowledge and manual handoffs. Join us on April 23 to learn how platform teams connect catalog data, environments, and pipelines to reduce friction and keep delivery consistent.

 

Break the cycle of spending $250bn on manual IT operations with the IT knowledge graph

Rules-based automation solves only 20% of IT problems, leaving a $250 billion manual burden. BigPanda’s IT Knowledge Graph fixes this by connecting fragmented data and institutional knowledge, allowing AI to handle the complex reasoning rules cannot. Join us on April 28 to see how this shift drives 430% ROI and reduces outages by replacing reactive, manual operations.

 

Spotify’s adoption of agentic-first development

AI agents are changing not just how software gets written, but who is responsible for it, how teams are structured, and what it means to own a system when an agent can modify thousands of components at once. Join us on April 29 for a deep dive on what agentic-first development actually looks like in practice at scale, what broke, and how platform engineering principles had to evolve to make it work.

 

From vectors to tensors: Expanding the possibilities of AI search

In this session, we will offer a practical primer on what tensors are, why they matter, and what they make possible in real-world applications, along with concrete use cases across retail, life sciences, and financial services. Join us live on May 5!

 

Connect with The New Stack
